What We Offer
Our Services

Comprehensive general practice care for every stage of life — from your first vaccinations to ongoing health and wellbeing.

Women's Health & Pregnancy

Dedicated, compassionate care through every stage — from antenatal checks and GP obstetric care to ongoing women's health.

Antenatal & Obstetric CareCervical ScreeningContraception

Vaccinations & Travel

Stay protected at home, at work and abroad with the full immunisation schedule and tailored pre-travel advice.

Childhood ImmunisationQ Fever VaccinationTravel Medicine

Men's Health & Skin Checks

Proactive health checks and early detection for common concerns, with thorough skin examinations.

Men's HealthSkin ChecksHealth Assessments

Mental Health & Workplace

Supportive mental health care with treatment plans and ongoing management, plus assessments for employment.

About Us

Mishricky Medical is located in central Wagga Wagga at the Wagga Wagga Specialist Medical Centre. We provide a range of quality general practice services and are committed to delivering compassionate, evidence-based care.

We are a teaching practice and regularly host medical students. We are fully accredited through AGPAL, eHealth registered, and have easy claim facilities onsite.

AGPAL Accredited

Fully accredited to the highest standards of general practice.

Teaching Practice

Training the next generation of medical professionals.

Easy Claiming

eHealth registered with easy claim facilities onsite.
